judge_explanation: The AI agent's conclusion is poorly justified and lacks depth. The Likert score is not well-calibrated because the agent relies solely on p-values without considering effect sizes or feature importance. There is no exploration of the shape of relationships or control for confounders, which adds to the incompleteness of the analysis. The explanation fails to provide insight into how variables might relate or why the conclusion is drawn, remaining limited to statistical significance without deeper interpretation.
